I know that you people from the jianghu don't care about the trivialities, but our Ji family is a famous official family after all, we still have to pay attention to some etiquette, isn't it a bit early to call me like this?
What happened???
Young hero {PlayerSurName}, please behave yourself, we're not that familiar yet.
Junior {PlayerName} pays respect to uncle.
Nephew {PlayerSurName}, you and Fuling have been sharing hardships and supporting each other, which makes me very relieved. I will have to rely on you to take care of Fuling for the rest of her life.
Who needs him to take care of me, I should be the one taking care of him.
Yes, yes, from now on, I will have to rely on sister Fuling to take care of me.
I have a gift for you, which I have prepared for nearly sixteen years, and finally have the opportunity to give it.
This is not a finished product, I specially ordered it from the innkeeper of Lin'an Painting Shop, it should be ready now, you can take it for your own use.
Thank you, uncle, for your kindness.
Thank you, father.
Innkeeper, I came here specifically for the item that Mr. Ji ordered from you.
Ah, the Ji family has been vindicated, Mr. Ji has been reinstated, and the Ji family is about to rise to prominence.
Well, I'll take your good words. Where's the item?
This, this, this... Unfortunately, the item is not ready yet, I'm sorry for failing Mr. Ji's trust.
What do you mean?

The Ji family's affairs are not small, after the Ji family had an accident, I didn't dare to let people know that I had any connection with the Ji family, so I took the liberty to burn the finished product.
In that case, I will tell Mr. Ji the truth, that the shopkeeper was afraid of getting involved and has broken the contract on his own.
Please don't tell Mr. Ji, I have a way to make up for it.
This item still has some remaining Material, and the style is still intact. It wouldn't be difficult to remake one, but we are still short of 2 Snow Silkworm Threads, which makes this a bit tricky.
I'll go find the Snow Silkworm Thread, you prepare for the other steps as soon as possible, don't let Mr. Ji down.
I heard that someone once bid for Snow Silkworm Thread at the <color=#097a76>Night Auction Market</color>. It's worth a fortune, and unless you're wealthy, you can only watch others get it.
Here is the Snow Silkworm Thread, please finish the work as soon as possible.
Take a good look, my craftsmanship is not a Fake fame!
Three shichen later.
Phew, with the joint efforts of all the top weavers in Lin'an City, we finally made it. I'm afraid no one will be able to make such exquisite clothes in this lifetime.
{PlayerName}, you killed my father, I swear I'll never share the sky with you!
{PlayerName}, even if I become a ghost, I won't let you go!
{PlayerName}, everyone has their own ambitions. You're willing to be a dog for Yan country, from now on, we are enemies!
Wishing for a devoted lover, never to part until white hair...
Miss Ji, what were you saying just now?
No, nothing.
Alas, life is short, I would be content if I could strike back for the Ji family in my remaining years. I'm not destined for love in this life.
I heard that if you receive the blessing of the Matchmaker, you can establish a bond for three lifetimes and meet again in the next life.
How about...
That's exactly what I'm thinking.

You two Sharing hardships, your bond is already as strong as gold, whether or not you receive blessings cannot change your feelings for each other.\nThis act is merely to follow local customs and provide some psychological comfort.
(Taking so many girls to the God of Marriage's Shrine, there might be unpredictable risks.)
(Each of the sisters around me is my beloved relative, who is my true love in this life, who is the one I truly care about...)
(Today, under the witness of the Matchmaker, I will follow my heart and choose the only one!)
Are you itching for a fight? Is your choice fair to me?
So I'm not the only one in your heart...
I should stab a few transparent holes in you, the unfaithful man, with a Dagger.
Hey, why didn't you choose me? I thought I was very important to you.
Oh, how about trying the new Toxicology I developed?
Boo hoo hoo, sir, don't you want me anymore...
Hmph, I knew there would be someone else in your heart.
Well, as long as you're happy.
{PlayerName}, you're really too much!
What am I to you?
Cai Die is not happy, very unhappy!
Huff... Huff...
Only the laughter of the newlyweds is heard, not the crying of the old...
Choose whoever you want, just don't spoil my mood.
I know you're just joking, Wei Er won't believe this is true.
So I'm just a nobody to you, it's simply inhuman.
{PlayerGivenName}, what are you up to? Be careful, I'll let the sisters beat you up!
Sharing the love of my husband with so many sisters, sigh...
Childish...
Men like every woman they see, who knows which one they truly love.
Sigh, ...
As long as I'm in your heart, even if I'm not the most important, I'm content.
Is this the choice you make from your heart?
It's really torturous, but this is my heartfelt choice, even the God of Marriage would support me.
The God of Marriage would never support a philanderer like you!
Where did you come from? Get out of here, don't bother me!
Do you know that your flirtatious behavior has provoked public anger? You even dare to visit the God of Marriage's Shrine with your lovers, it's a trample on the loyalty of love!
I'm just capricious, it's none of your business!
Today, the God of Marriage is on vacation, I'll teach you a lesson on his behalf.
Who dares to touch my man!
Bold villain, dare to attack {PlayerGivenName}!
Looking for death!
Take my Ye Family Spear!
I will make you taste the pain of wanting to live but can't, wanting to die but can't.
Bad guy, take my punch!
This fat guy doesn't look so tough, I'll help you deal with him.
With Me here, I won't let you hurt {PlayerName} at all!
Fatso, let's see if your skin is thicker or my knife is faster!
Sir, let's fight the enemy together.
(Without saying a word, he stands directly in front of you.)
Humph, dare to bully my brother, I'll make you pay!
Be careful, this fat guy is unfathomable.
Dare to touch my man, you have to pass me first.
Don't rush to fight, let's play a game first, guess how you will lose.
Watch out, I will play some special tunes for you, guaranteed to make you feel sick.
Arrogant fool, kill!
Dare to fight in front of me, you're overestimating yourself!
Those who offend my man, good luck to you.
Make An Example, to deter others.
Since you don't give me face, I don't need to be polite to you.
Touch my man, die!
Young master, I'm here to help you!
You will regret disrespecting my man!
Phew, it was just a dream.
A virtuous couple Happy Together, I can't do anything to you, {PlayerName} take care of yourself.
(It seems that sincerity is the key, it seems I am really a faithful person.)
Miss Ji, my master misses you a lot...
Tell your master to give up!
The master also specifically instructed that if there is a male companion around Miss Ji, kill without mercy!

I always bring disaster to people around me. If you still follow me, I don't know how much Collateral Damage there will be in the future. They will not let it go, I don't know when I will encounter them next time.
It's better to believe in your own strength than fate. If I meet them again next time, I will not let them escape so easily.
Miss Ji, we meet again.
Like master, like servant.
The master ordered, bring back the person alive or the body if dead.
It seems that the master has underestimated you, I need to put more effort into dealing with you.
He escaped again, his strength is not very good, but his ability to escape is top-notch.
Hehe, this time you can't escape!
A defeated general dares to come and die, this time I won't let you escape!
Keep the woman, kill the man without mercy!
You don't think we only sent these few people this time, do you? That was just an appetizer.
Just... bring it on...
Just bring it on.
Without using a killer move, I'm afraid we can't end this peacefully today.
Total Annihilation, leave no troubles behind!
Without him going back to report, it will be much quieter on the road in the future.
Are you injured? Let's find a place to rest before we continue on our journey.
I just used the killer move Blissful Ascent and didn't control my strength well, there was some backlash, but it's not a big deal, don't worry.
My father and the master of Langya Sword Pavilion, Jian Chi, were close friends. When I come to the territory of Wu Yue, it's my duty to pay him a visit.
Ji Fuling, the daughter of Ji Hanqing from Zhongzhou, pays her respects to Elder Jian Chi.
Oh, the girl from the Ji family has grown up so much. Ji brother is really blessed.
My father was punished for his words, and more than ten members of the Ji family have already become souls under the government's knife.
How could this happen! Could it be that Ji brother also...
My father also did not escape the disaster.
Alas, the treacherous are in power, misleading the country and the people!
Niece, is your purpose of this trip to ask me to take action and avenge your family with a Vengeful Strike?
There's no need to bother you, elder. I want to find out the real culprit and avenge my family on my own.
Indeed, you have the spirit of the Ji family!
Although I am not convenient to interfere in court affairs, I will do my best to help you, considering my friendship with Ji brother.
Niece, if you can break through the Four Phases Sword Formation of my Sword Pavilion alone, I will give you a unique divine weapon tailored for you.
Thanks to your blessing, my father really survived this disaster.

At first, when I heard about the extermination of the Ji family, I was devastated. But due to my status, I couldn't get involved in court affairs and couldn't vindicate the Ji family, which I deeply regret.
Now that Ji brother is safe and sound, the good are blessed by heaven!
Thank you for your concern for my father, elder.
If I don't prepare a gift for your visit, Ji brother will definitely laugh at me next time we meet.
How about this, if you can break through the Four Phases Sword Formation of my Sword Pavilion alone, I will give you a unique divine weapon tailored for you.
Are you ready to break through the sword formation alone, niece?
Niece, this sword formation of mine is not so easy to break through. I'll keep this divine weapon for you first, and you can come to get it when you are strong enough.
Ji brother should be comforted to have a daughter like you.
Honorable is innocent, but the crime lies in possessing the jade. Now that you have the skill to protect yourself, then...
Niece, take the divine weapon!
Thank you, senior.
The sister who taught me the Ice Heart Technique back then said she lived in the Melody House in the southwest. Since I'm here, I have to pay her a visit.
Melody House, sister... could it be her?
Sister, you are really here!
I didn't expect you to actually find this place. I thought you didn't take what I said to heart.
How could it be? Thanks to the Ice Heart Technique you taught me, otherwise I wouldn't have made it till now.
Well, you look much better than when we first met, which is a great relief.

However, up to now, the effect of Ice Heart Technique has greatly diminished and can't effectively help you calm your mind. I have a method of internal strength here, it's useless for others to learn, but it's very beneficial for you.
Before I teach you this method, I need to see how your cultivation is now. If your cultivation is shallow, I'm afraid you won't be able to withstand the pressure of this method.
Well, it seems that the time is not ripe yet, your cultivation is not enough to control this method.
Are you ready?
At such a young age, you have passed my test, which is quite rare.
I'll give you this manual, hope you study it well, it may save your life at a critical moment.
Thank you, sister.
Qin Huizhi has now unified the court and the martial arts world, becoming an unprecedented Supreme Overlord.
But he is cruel, even those who whisper about him are executed.
Although people are full of complaints, they dare not speak out.
It is said that Qin Huizhi has a loyal shadow by his side.
And the methods of that shadow are even more ruthless and heartless than Qin Huizhi...
Qin Huizhi never expected that the shadow he trusted would betray him...
Nor did he expect that when you called out, people responded in droves.
You stepped over Qin Huizhi's body and ascended to the throne amid cheers.
The unprecedented Supreme Overlord, his legend, has just begun...
In the end, you didn't take off the iron mask.
You walk in the darkness, but your heart is towards the light.
You punish evil with thunderous methods, maintaining the justice of the world.
Your iron mask has become a symbol that makes evildoers tremble...
And you yourself have become a legend, passed down from generation to generation...
You once took a wrong step and became a weapon in the hands of others.
You once put on a mask, abandoned yourself and became another person.
You made a big mistake, but you also punished evil with kindness.
Your efforts have finally been recognized by everyone, whether you wear a mask or not...
After enduring till the clouds part to reveal the sun, you have finally found yourself again.
The road ahead is still long...
This place is far from the Central Plains, no one should recognize me if I show my true face.
It's more comfortable this way.
When I return to the Central Plains, I should put on the iron mask.
(Opera recitation) My lord, my home is not far in the southeast direction~
Alright, let's go.
(Now that Feng Xizi is dead, I don't seem to have any reason to go southeast...)
(Now that I've broken with the Nine Factions Sect, I don't seem to have any reason to go southeast...)
Please make way, folks.
Was that Chai Wang... taken away by the General?
(Opera recitation) My lord, this has nothing to do with you~
Hmm, I don't plan to get involved in this mess.
Forget it, it has nothing to do with me.
(Opera recitation) I didn't see you, my lord, I deserve to die!
It doesn't matter.
(Opera recitation) My lord, have you considered the request I made earlier?
Your previous request? What was it?
(Opera recitation) My lord, you are so busy, it's natural that you forgot my request... I hope to go back to my hometown...
Go back to your hometown?
(Opera recitation) That thief is back now, I want to settle things.
What thief?
(Opera recitation) My lord, have you forgotten this too?
(Better not ask randomly...)
Feng Xizi, where is your hometown?
(Opera recitation) Southeast, Phoenix Woods Harbor.
Southeast... I haven't been to the southeast...
(Opera recitation) Would you like to go with me, my lord?
Ah? So suddenly...
(Opera recitation) If my lord is willing to go with me, then great things can be achieved~
(Shall we head southeast with Feng Xizi?)
\n|(Opera Monologue) This humble one will wait here for your message, my lord~
Since I have nothing to do for now, I might as well go with you.
(Opera recitation) Excellent, wonderful~
How do we get to the southeast?
\n|(Opera Monologue) There is a pass to the southwest of here, called Meishan Pass. My lord can follow this humble one there~
Okay.
\n|(Opera Monologue) My lord, the first house on the left after entering the city is my old home.
The first house on the left... Okay, I got it.
Nothing has changed...
Just like the old days...
Things remain the same, but people have changed...
Who... who are you! Why are you in my house!
Suspicious fellow, I'm going to report you to the authorities!
You... you are—!
Feathered robe!? Aren't you mad...\nWhy are you here, and what's with that painted face...
Oh, I see, you've finally come to your senses, and you've even brought a disciple to perform for me~
\n|(Opera Monologue)... You killed the king!
\n|(Opera Monologue) I'm here to take your life and avenge the king!
Wait, the death of the Troupe Leader has nothing to do with me!
Troupe Leader...
When I came to Phoenix Woods Harbor for business years ago, I saw your troupe's performance. How did that saying go... Ah, yes, it was magnificent, a feast for the eyes!
I was so fond of it that I wanted to buy your troupe with money, so you could perform only for me!
(Wanting to buy a troupe with money to perform only for oneself, how selfish.)
As for the Troupe Leader's sudden death from illness... it has nothing to do with me!
Feathered robe, think about it. When the Troupe Leader was seriously ill, I even sent him medicine—!
Who... was the Troupe Leader...
Who... was the feathered robe...
You...
Get lost.
You say...
Get lost!
Okay, okay...
Feng Xizi, how are you?
Troupe Leader...?
Feathered robe...?
This humble one...
The king...
Who...
Feng Xizi, where are you going!
As expected of Feng Xizi, she disappeared in the blink of an eye...
It seems she went in the northwest direction of Phoenix Woods Harbor... I better catch up.
Feng Xizi, you're here. You're hard to find.
You are...
Who's this rascal, daring to disturb my consort!
Wait, you don't even recognize me?
Rascal, prepare to die!
Feng Xizi, look closely, don't you even recognize me?!
Sect leader...
I dared to attack the sect leader, I deserve to die!
...I'm not used to you speaking so normally all of a sudden.\nWhat exactly do you want to do by going southeast this time?
The rich merchant from Persia killed the Troupe Leader and then fled back to Persia. I heard that he returned to Phoenix Woods Harbor these days, so...
From what that guy said, the Troupe Leader should have died of illness?
He did die of illness, but that guy threatened the Troupe Leader by buying up all the medicine in the medical hall, leaving the Troupe Leader without treatment...
Buying up all the medicine... this guy is really ruthless.
The Troupe Leader believed that the troupe was the result of everyone's hard work, not his alone, so he chose to die unyielding...
But after the Troupe Leader died... after he died...
Feng Xizi? What's wrong with you?
\n|(Opera Monologue) My lord? Where is this place? Am I dreaming?
...It seems her madness has returned.\nWell, I'll go ask that rich merchant again.
Feng Xizi, come with me.
As you wish~
I knew you would come back, I've been waiting for a long time!
Hmph, don't think I'm easy to deal with!
It seems that there's no need to ask you anything.
Kill that man and leave the feathered dress, I want him to perform for me!
(In opera tone) You're just a bunch of ants, not worth my attention!\nMy lord, let me clear a path for you!
Please, spare my life...
Tell me everything about the Troupe Leader.
Didn't I tell you before...
But you didn't mention that you bought all the medicine from the medical hall, leaving the Troupe Leader without any.
I just wanted to do a favor and give the medicine to the Troupe Leader...
You wanted to take over the troupe, how could the Troupe Leader accept your offer?
So I thought... if I did this, he would have no choice... who knew he would rather die...
What happened then?
Then... the Troupe Leader died of illness...
I'm asking what you did with the medicine afterwards?
Oh, the medicine... the Troupe Leader didn't want it, so I threw it all away.
Threw it away?
You buried the medicine in the mud by the river! By the time I dug them up, they were already moldy and infested!
That was the Troupe Leader's... (In opera tone) life-saving medicine!
I have another question, how did you know what disease the Troupe Leader had and what medicine to prescribe?
The... Doctor told me.
How could the Doctor from the medical hall tell you? Even if he did, how could he let you buy all the herbs?
{yell} Ahhh, my arm...
If you lie again, the next thing to break will be your leg.
I... I was bewitched, I poisoned the Troupe Leader with Perth's medicine...
I knew it.
Feng Xizi, he's yours now, do as you please.

You turn and leave, leaving Feng Xizi and the Perth Merchant in the room.\nYou close the door, and the screams of the Perth Merchant can be heard from inside.\nA shichen later, the screams stop, and the room is silent.
...Is it over?
My revenge is complete, thank you, my lord. If you ever need me in the future, I will not hesitate to give my life.
Good, I look forward to your performance.
(In opera tone) My heart belongs to my lord, how could I fall for someone else?
(In opera tone) Who is this upstart? Stay away from my consort!
(In opera tone) At your command, my lord~
(In opera tone) There are so many talents around my lord, I'm afraid there's no place for me.
Ye Pengju, our long-standing rivalry is finally coming to an end.
Wanyan Wuzhu, it's too early to declare victory.

Uncertain outcome? Ye Pengju, look around, how many people do you have left? If you could join forces with the Chu Xiang army, maybe you would have a chance. But now, with one order from me, your Ye Family Battalion will be crushed!
But I admire your heroism. If you surrender, I can recommend you to the emperor to be a king of a different surname, how about it?
The Ye Family Battalion only has brave men who would rather die than surrender!
Besides, the outcome is still uncertain!
Glory and success are within reach!
Wanyan Wuzhu, meet your end!
There are actually ambushes, but Ye Pengju, I, the marshal, also have reinforcements!
Tie Mianren, you're finally here.
Nine Factions Sect... you really are working with the Yan people...
No, Wanyan Wuzhu, I'm afraid I'll have to disappoint you.
Tie Mianren, what is this...
Drive out the invaders, rescue Chuxiang City!
Wanyan Wuzhu, you were right about one thing, our long-standing rivalry is indeed coming to an end.
Ha, I never thought that I, who have been wise all my life, would end up defeated by a fickle villain like Tie Mianren!
Ye Pengju, you and I are both upright heroes, don't end up defeated by villains like me.
I will keep that in mind.
What are you waiting for? Get started!

Tie Mianren, your contribution to the defense of Chuxiang City is undeniable. But I, the marshal, want to ask, according to the information I received earlier, it seems that you were working with the Yan Yun Iron Army?
Marshal Ye, as you said, I was indeed working with them before, but after being scolded by these fellow martial artists, I have suddenly enlightened and corrected my mistakes.

Good, there's no greater virtue than a prodigal son returning to the right path. With your help, we can expect to reclaim our lost territory soon! It's just a shame that the late emperor won't get to see it...

You have made great contributions to this battle and will soon become a hero in the eyes of the people of Chuxiang City. Prepare to accept the people's praise, I will lead the army back to camp first.

Ye Pengju led the army back to the camp without any intention of taking credit, as if they had just done something they were supposed to do.\nYou enter Chuxiang City, and the people of the city welcome you...
I didn't expect that without the old rival, a group of defeated soldiers would be so tenacious.
Wanyan Wuzhu! As long as there is one person left in our Ye Family Battalion, we will never let you step into Chuxiang City!
Don't worry, soon there will be no one left in your Ye Family Battalion, and then I, the marshal, will offer the entire Chuxiang City as a sacrifice to your marshal!
Tie Mianren, you're late, I'm about to take Chuxiang City.
No, I arrived just in time!
Tie Mianren, what is this...
Drive out the invaders, rescue Chuxiang City!
Ha, I never thought that I, who have been wise all my life, would end up defeated by a fickle villain like you!
No, you were defeated by your own ignorance and arrogance.
Don't think about attacking Zhao country in your next life.
Thank you, Tie Mianren, for your help. This victory is all thanks to you.
You, with only a remnant of your forces, dared to resist the Yan Yun Iron Army. This spirit is even more admirable.
Not at all, we just wanted to fulfill Marshal Ye's last wish...
After this battle, you should be a great hero in the eyes of the people of Chuxiang City. Please enter the city, we won't stay here for long.
Aren't you going into the city with us?
Marshal Ye is dead, we have gathered forces without authorization, which is a capital crime, how can we enter the city?
...General, please accept my salute.
I dare not. Farewell.
Risking a capital crime to protect Chuxiang City... I'm the same.

What a great hero!|So majestic!|Truly extraordinary!|Thank you, great hero|Chuxiang City is always protected by great heroes|A real man should be like this|Amazing!|I heard he commands a group of heroes...|He doesn't look very strong though

We really owe him a lot this time|Lay down the butcher's knife and become a Buddha on the spot|A prodigal who returns is more precious than gold|Nine Factions Sect has changed|I really didn't expect this.|Being able to correct past mistakes is good.
What is the meaning of this...
Thanks to the heroic efforts of Tie Mianren and his allies, Chuxiang City was spared from destruction this time!
These civilians have come to welcome you, the great hero, of their own accord.
Great hero... Me?
Yes, in my opinion as a General, your actions are no less heroic than his!
(That's right, people from the Nine Factions Sect...)
(Qin Huizhi must already know about my betrayal... Given his style, he's probably already ordered my execution...)
...Hero?
Huh? What did you just say?
I have prepared a banquet in your honor, I hope you won't decline.
Thank you for your kindness, but I must take my leave now, farewell!
Thanks to the heroic efforts of Tie Mianren and his allies, Chuxiang City was spared from destruction this time!
These civilians have come to welcome you, the great hero, of their own accord.
Great hero... Me?
Yes, in my opinion as a Prefecture, your actions are no less heroic than his!
The camera returns to the protagonist.
(That's right, people from the Nine Factions Sect...)
(Qin Huizhi must already know about my betrayal... Given his style, he's probably already ordered my execution...)
...Hero?
Huh? What did you just say?
The Prefecture has prepared a banquet in your honor, I hope you won't decline.
Thank you for your kindness, but I must take my leave now, farewell!

You've committed the greatest crime in the world, but also done the greatest good.
Yet the world only knows of your crime, and only knows of Tie Mianren's good deeds.
Neither the martial world nor the temples can accommodate you.
The Nine Factions Sect can't accommodate Tie Mianren either.
You stumble and accidentally return to this dilapidated temple.
In the vast martial world, the only place that can accommodate you is this dilapidated temple that can't even block the wind or rain...

Taking advantage of the fact that no one has found you yet, you simply settle down in this dilapidated temple.\nIn the morning, you hunt wild game in the nearby forest, and at night, you roast it to eat, living a rather adventurous life.\nTime passes day by day, you put the matters of the martial world behind you, as if you have no relation to it.
You thought you would live out your life like this, until...
So you're here, you've made it hard for me to find you.
Master?! How come you're here?
Don't call me master, you left the sect yourself, don't you remember?
You caused a big trouble and hid in such a place, making it hard for me to find you.
...The righteous martial arts factions know that I killed the emperor, and the Nine Factions Sect says I betrayed them, and issued a kill order against me...
No matter where I go, there are people holding knives wanting my life, I can't even sleep peacefully...
Luckily, this place hasn't been discovered, otherwise I would really have nowhere to go.
This is what I was most worried about when you joined the Nine Factions Sect.

At that time, you were new to the martial world, your heart was not bad but you lacked experience, and you were easily swayed by people with ulterior motives, believing only what you wanted to believe.
People like you, even if they are sold, will still help count the money...
But the fact that you can pull back from the brink shows that there is hope for you.
You!? Are you here to kill me?
Kill you? Why would I want to kill you?
Isn't it because I killed the old emperor!
It seems you know that killing the emperor was wrong, that's good, it seems there is hope for you.
...You're really not here to kill me?
Why is your mind full of fighting and killing, did Qin Huizhi make you stupid?
Then what are you here for...
I just came to see how the child who once had a brief encounter with me, but took the wrong path due to a moment's thought, is doing now.
You probably don't know my name yet. To earn your trust, I'll tell you.
My name is Yan Gexing. I have quite a deep connection with the Nine Factions Sect.
Yan Gexing...
What do you think? It's a decent name, isn't it? Have you heard of me from Qin Huizhi?
No...
Since there is hope for you, I am willing to save you.\nThere happens to be a clear path in front of you right now!
A clear path?
Several major events have occurred in the martial arts world while you were in seclusion here.
Firstly, Duke Kang and Duke Qi ascended to the throne one after another. Duke Kang established the era name Jianyan, and Duke Qi established the era name Long Xing.
The Yan Yun Iron Army has just been annihilated, and these two princes are so eager to ascend to the throne, it must have been premeditated for a long time.
Is this the path for me? You're not suggesting that I should assassinate the king again, are you...
Who asked you to assassinate the king! Can you forget everything you learned from Qin Huizhi!
Well...
The real path for you is this second event.

After Duke Kang ascended to the throne, he immediately dismissed Ye Pengju, the commander of the Ye Family Battalion, and imprisoned him in the Supreme Court, accusing him of "holding troops for personal gain and intending to rebel".
How is that possible, Marshal Ye assisted Chuxiang City, facing the Yan Yun army without fear, how could he be such a person?!
Good, there is still hope for you.
Marshal Ye's situation is very dangerous now, if no one intervenes, he may be wrongfully killed in the Supreme Court.
And to save Marshal Ye is not something that can be accomplished by one person, those martial arts factions will also fear the power of the court and dare not intervene.
At this time, we need someone with high prestige, who can rally the righteous factions with a wave of his arm...
You're right, but where can we find such a person...
Of course there is, and one is right in front of me!
You mean...
Of course I'm talking about Tie Mianren!\nNow, Tie Mianren's deeds of commanding the righteous martial arts factions to guard Chuxiang City are known to all, this task can only be entrusted to you!
I see, you want me to put on this Tie Mianren's clothes again to rescue Marshal Ye, is this my path?

After Duke Kang ascended to the throne, he immediately arrested all the remaining troops of the Ye Family Battalion and imprisoned them in the Supreme Court, accusing them of "gathering without permission and intending to rebel".
How is that possible, the remnants of the Ye Family Battalion were there to guard Chuxiang City, how could they be planning a rebellion!
Good, there is still hope for you.
But the official handling this case is very determined, these troops are in a very dangerous situation, if no one intervenes, they may be wrongfully killed in the Supreme Court.
At this time, we need someone with high prestige, who can rally the righteous factions with a wave of his arm...
You're right, but where can we find such a person...
Of course there is, and one is right in front of me!
You mean...
Of course I'm talking about Tie Mianren!\nNow, Tie Mianren's deeds of commanding the righteous martial arts factions to guard Chuxiang City are known to all, this task can only be entrusted to you!
I see, you want me to put on this Tie Mianren's clothes again to rescue Marshal Ye's troops, is this my path?
This is just the first step on your path! Our ultimate goal is to reorganize the Nine Factions Sect and get the Nine Factions Sect back on track!
Nine Factions Sect? Do you have relations with the Nine Factions Sect?
Hehe, did Qin Huizhi tell you about the founding of the Nine Factions Sect?
No.

The Nine Factions Sect was originally founded by me and my senior brother. Our initial intention was to protect the downtrodden. But later, the sect became a mix of good and bad, causing trouble everywhere, as if they wanted to stir up chaos in the world...

My senior brother and I had a disagreement about the future direction of the Nine Factions Sect, so I was forced to run away. Later, the Nine Factions Sect became more and more reckless, even disregarding the three major sects, which eventually led to their joint suppression.

My senior brother was obsessed with passive skills and had no intention of managing the Nine Factions Sect, so he left everything to his disciple. And it was his disciple who, while expanding the Nine Factions Sect, also led the Nine Factions Sect into an irreparable situation.
And his disciple, guess who it is?
Could it be Qin Huizhi?
That's right, it's this Qin Huizhi! If you obediently become my disciple, you should call yourself uncle in terms of seniority!
I didn't expect such a connection...
Because of this, I can no longer allow Nine Factions Sect to run rampant. I must clean up Nine Factions Sect and return it to its original intention.
But whether it's me or my senior brother, we are all old. Nine Factions Sect needs a younger generation to take charge.
After much thought, you are the best candidate. When you and the reborn Nine Factions Sect are praised by others, it will be time for you to remove your mask.
I see, but what does this have to do with me going to the Supreme Court?

My senior brother was imprisoned in a secret place by the three religions. Although I found out the location of this place a few days ago, it is heavily guarded by the three religions and I have no chance to approach.
But this time you go to the Supreme Court, the focus of the three religions will be on you, and I can take the opportunity to rescue my senior brother.
By then, the three of us can reorganize Nine Factions Sect!
I see.
Then let's wish each other success.
Tie Mianren's clothes...
I once wanted to destroy this piece of clothing.
But now it seems that some things can only be done by wearing it.
Qin Huizhi, watch closely, what I lost, I will take back with my own hands!
Let these guys see how powerful we are!
Yan dog, go back to your hometown!
Today is the end of your life!
How dare you, Yan people, lay hands on Chuxiang City!
Today I will avenge my father!
Let you see how powerful I am!
Let Monk Me make a big fuss!
There is no one here...
As the guard said, the trial has already started, I should go to the Supreme Court as soon as possible.
Could it be that the trial has already started? I should go to the Supreme Court as soon as possible!
Ye Pengju, now someone is accusing you of intending to rebel, this is solid evidence, what else do you have to say?
This is absolutely absurd, how can such testimony convict me!
Royal decree, once Ye Pengju's treason is confirmed, he will be immediately sent to Fengbo Pavilion for execution...
Stop!
Tie Mianren?!
(I didn't expect the person in charge of this case to be Qin Huizhi... No, it's not time to take revenge on him, I have to hold on...)
How come you are here?
Marshal Ye is a loyal and good man in the world today, but he is treated unfairly. Why can't I come to uphold justice for him?
How can you mess around in the court?!
Mess around? No, I am a reasonable person. I believe this court is also a place of reason, not a place where bandits roam in the outskirts, right?
column3: พูดอะไรน่ะ? ไม่, ข้าเป็นคนมีเหตุผล และข้าก็เชื่อว่าศาลนี้ก็เป็นที่ที่มีเหตุผลเช่นกัน ไม่ใช่ที่รกร้าง หรือซ่องโจรอย่างที่เจ้าพูดหรอกนะ ใช่ไหม?

column2: What do you mean by that? This is contempt for the court!
I probably know better than Lord Qin about how to deal with contempt for the court.
So you are a constable from the Crime Investigation Bureau...
Oh, isn't this Constable Luo from the Crime Investigation Bureau? What brings you to the Supreme Court without permission?

Luo Tianxiong, on behalf of the Crime Investigation Bureau, is here to help Tie Mianren uphold justice! The Crime Investigation Bureau is here, ready to arrest those who frame the loyal and good people at any time.
Are you from the Crime Investigation Bureau here to arrest me?
Who framed the loyal and good, we have not yet determined. But Lord Qin, in your high position, must know a lot. What you just said will be considered an important clue.
Hmph!
Humph, I really didn't expect that the Crime Investigation Bureau, which originated from the court, would stand on the side of Jianghu today.
What I didn't expect even more is that the people protected by the Ye Family Battalion are actually standing in the court that is judging the Ye Family Battalion.
Thank you for the assistance of the Crime Investigation Bureau!
Amitabha.
Old monk has seen all the donors.
Even the Shifa Temple is involved...

I have been spiritually connected with Marshal Ye for many years. Now that I hear that Marshal Ye is being tried by the Supreme Court, I respond to Tie Mianren's call to see this friend and also to see the thunderous methods of the masters in the court.
Thank you for the assistance of Master Hui Yuan!
Hmph!
The plaque in this court reads "Mirror Hanging High", but I don't see any mirrors in this court.
Tie Mianren, do you know where the mirror is?
Please enlighten me.
This bright mirror hanging high, in the hearts of the world's people.
Now I have to tell you all, this bright mirror... is also kept in my scabbard!
Thank you, Master Zhong Yangzi, for your help!
Tie Mianren is a chivalrous hero, how can we not come to help?
Master of Lengxiang Gate has met Tie Mianren!
Lengxiang Sect? What is this unheard of small sect?
Even if Lengxiang Gate is small, we know right from wrong. Besides, if the two adults feel that it is not enough...
The whole Xuan Kong Pavilion is also willing to lend a hand to Tie Mianren!
We, the Green Snake Gang, naturally have to join in the fun!
Even if the Flying Feather Gang is destroyed today, we have to voice our grievances for Marshal Ye!
The sword of Taihua Sect will always swing for the side of justice!
Tie Mianren, are you gathering so many Vagabonds to rebel in the court by gathering so many Vagabonds?
I dare not, I just want to fight for justice for Marshal Ye.
Justice? What a righteous Tie Mianren you are.

Enough talk, Qin Huizhi, the whole world is waiting to see the result of this judgment. Justice is in the hearts of the people, I hope your judgment can live up to your own conscience, and also live up to the hearts of the people of the world!
Yes!|Hurry up and make the judgment!|We are all watching you!|Do you have a conscience!|Marshal Ye is innocent!
After the trial of this court, the case of Ye Family BattalionYe Pengju's rebellion is based on "unfounded" evidence. Although the evidence is not true, the suspicion is unforgivable.

Considering Marshal Ye's many years of campaigning and meritorious service, I order Ye Pengju to be demoted to a civilian, released from his shackles, and sent back to the people with the suspicion of a crime. When the evidence is fully established, he will be recalled for retrial!
Tie Mianren, are you satisfied with this trial?
As expected of Lord Qin, you make sense. If the evidence is not true, what crime is there? It's only right to retry when your evidence is fully established.
Marshal Ye has suffered.
You, the remnants of the Ye Family Battalion, have gathered the remnants without authorization, intending to rebel, the evidence is conclusive, do you have anything to say?
I, the Guardian of the Homeland, what crime have I committed!
Royal decree, once the rebellion of the remnants of the Ye Family Battalion is confirmed, all members will be immediately taken to Fengbo Pavilion for execution...
Stop!
Tie Mianren?!
(I didn't expect the person in charge of this case to be Qin Huizhi... No, it's not time to take revenge on him, I have to hold on...)
How come you are here?

Marshal Ye is a loyal and good man in the world today. Although he is dead, his troops still respect his will, the Guardian of the Homeland. If they are treated unfairly, why can't I come to fight for justice for them?
How can you mess around in the court?!
Mess around? No, I am a reasonable person. I believe this court is also a place of reason, not a place where bandits roam in the outskirts, right?
column3: พูดอะไรน่ะ? ไม่, ข้าเป็นคนมีเหตุผล และข้าก็เชื่อว่าศาลนี้ก็เป็นที่ที่มีเหตุผลเช่นกัน ไม่ใช่ที่รกร้าง หรือซ่องโจรอย่างที่เจ้าพูดหรอกนะ ใช่ไหม?

column2: What do you mean by that? This is contempt for the court!
So you are a constable from the Crime Investigation Bureau...
Oh, isn't this Constable Luo from the Crime Investigation Bureau? What brings you to the Supreme Court without permission?

Luo Tianxiong, on behalf of the Crime Investigation Bureau, is here to help Tie Mianren uphold justice! The Crime Investigation Bureau is here, ready to arrest those who frame the loyal and good people at any time.
Are you from the Crime Investigation Bureau here to arrest me?
Who framed the loyal and good, we have not yet determined. But Lord Qin, in your high position, must know a lot. What you just said will be considered an important clue.
Hmph!
Humph, I really didn't expect that the Crime Investigation Bureau, which originated from the court, would stand on the side of Jianghu today.
What I didn't expect even more is that the people protected by the Ye Family Battalion are actually standing in the court that is judging the Ye Family Battalion.
Thank you for the assistance of the Crime Investigation Bureau!
Old monk has seen all the donors.
Even the Shifa Temple is involved...

The old monk has been spiritually connected with Marshal Ye for many years, and his death has made me sigh. Now that the remnants of the Ye family are being tried by the Supreme Court, I responded to Tie Mianren's call to see the thunderous methods of the masters in the hall.
Thank you for the assistance of Master Hui Yuan!
Hmph!
The plaque in this court reads "Mirror Hanging High", but I don't see any mirrors in this court.
Tie Mianren, do you know where the mirror is?
Please enlighten me.
This bright mirror hanging high, in the hearts of the world's people.
Now I have to tell you all, this bright mirror... is also kept in my scabbard!
Thank you, Master Zhong Yangzi, for your help!
Tie Mianren is a chivalrous hero, how can we not come to help?
Master of Lengxiang Gate has met Tie Mianren!
Lengxiang Sect? What is this unheard of small sect?
Even if Lengxiang Gate is small, we know right from wrong. Besides, if the two adults feel that it is not enough...
The whole Xuan Kong Pavilion is also willing to lend a hand to Tie Mianren!
We, the Green Snake Gang, naturally have to join in the fun!
Even if the Flying Feather Gang is destroyed today, we must fight for justice for the Ye Family Battalion!
The sword of Taihua Sect will always swing for the side of justice!
Tie Mianren, are you gathering so many Vagabonds to rebel in the court by gathering so many Vagabonds?
I dare not, I just want to fight for justice for the Ye Family Battalion.
Justice? What a righteous Tie Mianren you are.

Enough talk, Qin Huizhi, the whole world is waiting to see the result of this judgment. Justice is in the hearts of the people, I hope your judgment can live up to your own conscience, and also live up to the hearts of the people of the world!
Yes!|Hurry up and make the judgment!|We are all watching you!|Do you have a conscience!|Marshal Ye is innocent!
After the trial of this court, the evidence of the rebellion of the remnants of the Ye Family Battalion is "unfounded", although the evidence is not true, the suspicion is unforgivable.

The official, considering the many years of fighting and high merits of the Ye Family Battalion, orders all the remnants to be demoted to civilians, released from bondage, and sent back to the people with the suspicion of crime, waiting for the evidence to be detailed, and then recalled for retrial!
Tie Mianren, are you satisfied with this trial?
As expected of Lord Qin, you make sense. If the evidence is not true, what crime is there? It's only right to retry when your evidence is fully established.
General has suffered.
Wait, is this Supreme Court a place where you can come and go as you please?
Qin Huizhi, do you have anything else to say?
Heh, of course! Heroes of the rivers and lakes, do you know who this Tie Mianren really is?
...Is it important who I am?
Tie Mianren, you can get so many righteous people in the rivers and lakes to stand up for you with a wave of your arm, such a reputation can be compared to the Jianghu Master.
But if everyone in the world knows that these righteous sects are following a person who dares not show his true face, what would the world think?
This...|If it's really like this...|Why don't we see for ourselves?|Could it really be...
(The heads of these small sects are already wavering. If they know that I am {PlayerName} who killed the former emperor, the situation here might really reverse...)
What's wrong, Tie Mianren? Don't you dare to take off your mask?
(I can't take off the mask at this time, but I can't ignore this request... What should I do...)
What are you waiting for? Can't your true face be shown? Are you actually a great villain who is utterly wicked?
(Damn Qin Huizhi...)
Haha, this scene, it's really like that year!
Demon Chu Kuangsheng? How come you are here!
You old bull nose came, why can't I come?
Amitabha... Chu Kuangsheng, long time no see.
Indeed, it's been a long time, you old turtle look even older.
Chu Kuangsheng?! How come you---
How dare you, the name Chu Kuangsheng is not something you can call casually?
Chu Kuangsheng?|Who is that?|Never heard of him.|He seems tough to deal with.
(So he is Chu Kuangsheng, this saves me a lot of trouble...)
Who are you and what are you doing in the court!
I've been this Old Demon for decades, what else could I possibly do this time?
Masked boy, you must be the most reputable person in this court! Let me see how capable the young generation is!
It's a pity that this place is too small to show off our skills, let's fight outside!
Chu Kuangsheng, are you going to cause chaos in the martial arts world again?
Amitabha, I will not sit idly by while you do evil!
What are you trying to do? Stop him for me!
Hehe, it's not up to you!
Let's go!
This Old Man looks old and frail, but he effortlessly carries you and shakes off the pursuers in a few steps.\nWhat's even more incredible is that he carries you without causing you any discomfort...
Senior Chu, what are you trying to do?
You really don't understand, kid. I saved you and you don't even say thank you?
...Indeed, thank you for your rescue, senior.
Hehe, that's more like it.
But I don't know why senior saved me?
Isn't it because my good junior brother asked me to help, and to give those self-proclaimed righteous people a bit of a shock!
It's just a pity that the fat man named Cai is not here, otherwise I really want to see his expression!
Senior brother, you really don't wait for anyone.
How did you become so slow, junior brother, it took you so long to get here?
My old injury just healed, I can't compare to your speed.
If I were as slow as you, your good disciple would have been killed by those guys long ago!
So the senior brother you mentioned is Senior Chu!
Yes, it's him, it seems you two get along well.
This kid is not as compassionate as you, more to my liking!
Who made this kid take Qin Huizhi as his master, of course he is more to your liking.
This kid took Qin Huizhi as his master? Hahaha, kid, why don't you call me master?
Mas...Master.
Good boy, for this master's call, I should give you a gift!
Alright, senior brother, stop playing, we should do something serious.
Take back the Nine Factions Sect, right? What Qin Huizhi is doing now is unbearable to me, it's time to clean up.
{PlayerName}, I will pass on my ultimate skill to you today, we will go ahead to the Nine Factions Sect and wait for you, then the three of us will clean up together!
Alright, I'll be there soon.
Traitor Tie Mianren, you dare to come back!
I came back to take back everything I lost and put the Nine Factions Sect back on track!
Those who don't want to go to the grave with Qin Huizhi, run away, those who stay, there is only one way to die!
Hmph, you're full of big talk!
These disciples are really loyal to Qin Huizhi, better hurry to the Senluo Hall and settle accounts with Qin Huizhi.
(Opera recitation) Bold traitor, dare to return to the royal land!
You little brat... you really dare to come back.
...Old woman really doesn't want to see the white-haired person sending off the black-haired person...
Your forehead is dark, you are doomed today!
...You finally came.
Qin Huizhi, I want to take back everything I lost!
Everything you've lost? Interesting, what exactly have you lost? Everything you have now is given by Me!
But because of you, I lost {PlayerName}, I lost myself!
It's because of you, you killed the emperor yourself, don't blame others.
On the contrary, it's you guys, you are the ones who really took everything from Me!
Because you turned against us in the battle, Yan Yun Iron Army was destroyed, disrupting all our subsequent plans!
Because you guys made a mess in the Supreme Court, Jian Yan Emperor was furious and demoted Me to a commoner!
Because you old man saved this Old Demon, the last card of Me was also taken away by you! His skills, those Manuals he stole, should have been used by Me!
...I originally wanted to spare your life for the sake of our master-disciple relationship, it seems that there's no need to be kind-hearted and soft anymore.
Qin Huizhi, those who commit many injustices will kill themselves, this is all your own fault.
Your own fault? What do you old men know! As two of the Eight Saints, do you know how we ordinary people at the bottom feel?
When you rob the rich to help the poor, have you ever thought about where the poor people who depend on the rich for their livelihood will go?

When you save an Official who was attacked by bandits on the road, have you ever thought about whether this Official is loyal or treacherous, clean or dirty, and whether someone will lose their home and family because of this?!
Have you ever thought about it when you are avenging your grudges, the people you kill also have their own parents, wives and children, how are these people going to live?
When you eat meat and drink wine, have you ever thought that some people can't afford to eat and have to catch mice and insects to fill their hunger?!

You never thought about these issues, what you old guys think about is nothing more than castles in the air! It's Me who gave these people who suffered because of you so-called righteous people a place to stay!
But this is not a reason for you to act recklessly and do all kinds of evil.
You all have hands and feet, and a place to live. You could do more good deeds to benefit the world.
What about those who oppress us? Do we deserve to be bullied by them, and they should be above us?
They despise the law and lose their conscience. Someone will deal with them.

Someone will deal with them? Leave everything to others? What's the difference from before? Since we are gathered here, we need to establish new rules, let those who are high above fall into the mud, and be trampled by thousands of people!
Just one step away... just one step away!
{PlayerName}, you ruined all my plans. How dare you come to me for justice!
Damn it, it's you guys!
Be careful, that guy is furious and has become obsessed. Don't get hurt by him.
Die!!
From Qin Huizhi down, all of Nine Factions Sect died, a layer of filth has finally been thoroughly cleansed...
<size=250%><color=#E3170D>Nine Factions Sect, annihilated!</color></size>
...You two could say something.
Thinking about Qin Huizhi's death, it feels somewhat unreal.
Now you are like his disciple, just as sentimental as him! Instead of being sentimental, think about what to do next.
...Yes, not only do we need to reorganize the Nine Factions Sect, but also find a way to remove your mask.
What's wrong with this mask?
This kid made a mistake before, which caused him to hide his identity and wander around the world.
What's the matter? Did you offend the Heavenly King or something?
Almost, just made the emperor become the "late emperor".
Hahahahaha!\nInteresting, interesting. When I was young, I could only come and go freely in the palace. You, young man, are even more powerful than me!
I'm liking you more and more! Would you like to take me as your master?
Senior brother, why are you stealing my love?
Who made him unwilling to take you as his master?
How do you know he's still unwilling now?
Why don't we have another competition, whoever wins will take him as a disciple?
Humph, let's compete, who's afraid of who!
Um... Shouldn't you ask for my opinion...
What's the matter? Many people can't even beg for the opportunity to take us as masters, and you're being picky?
Besides, you're going to take over the Nine Factions Sect, it's only right to take us as your masters.
And we both have high seniority, you don't want to call us master all the time, do you?
Wait, take over the Nine Factions Sect? I've never heard of this...
It's your young people's era now, if you don't take over, should we two old men buried in the soil do it?
Go away, you're the one buried in the soil, I'm only half buried!
But... Can I do it...
Don't worry, with our help, you can definitely do it.
Speaking of which, I have a good idea. Let this kid take both of us as masters at the same time, what do you think?
Deviant, it's a good idea that only you could come up with!
Anyway, my disciple is dead, you should give me a disciple according to the rules!
Who calculates like that!
Forget it, I'll make the decision. Kid, you kowtow to me three times to acknowledge me as your master, then kowtow to him three times to acknowledge him as your master, that's it!
Why should I kowtow to you first!
Because I'm your senior brother!

So, amidst the bickering of the two old men, you took them both as your masters.\nThe burden of the new Nine Factions Sect finally fell on your shoulders, but with these two masters accompanying you, it wasn't too heavy.\nNext, it's about how to deal with this mask...
Alright, it's time to discuss the issue of {PlayerName}'s mask.
I already have an idea, what about you, junior brother?

Now that he is the rightful master of the Nine Factions Sect, and his reputation in the martial arts world is quite high, I think as long as he becomes the Master of Jianghu, when he takes off his mask and explains the reason, people will naturally accept him.

Tsk, the righteous martial arts world is just like it was back then, all a bunch of fake honorable people! In my opinion, he should be like our eldest brother, a maintainer of martial arts order, an impartial judge with an iron face!

Good disciple, listen to me, you go and become the Peak of Jianghu! From then on, you won't be bound by those so-called martial arts orders, and it will make you, your iron face, a symbol of justice in the martial arts world!
Do you want him to become a devil like you?
What devil? The people I killed deserved to die, and the things I did were all in line with my conscience!
It's just that those so-called righteous people can't tolerate a righteous and honorable person like me who is above them!
But as long as everyone in the world recognizes this iron face, those righteous people can't say anything.
Brother, violence has never led to good results.
Some people only recognize fists, not people.
Good disciple, think about it, how are you going to walk this path in the future.
I really need to think about this...
Now the six major sects of the martial arts world are incomplete... The path of the Jianghu Master may not be feasible.
What's in front of me is only the path to becoming the Peak of Jianghu.
Now that I am a Jianghu Master, let's call the heads of all sects again.
Do you want to call the heads of all sects?
What is the purpose of the leader's call this time?
Today I called everyone here to tell you something...
Now that the three sect leaders are dead, what should we do about this peak debate...
Hey, have you heard? The peak debate seems to be about to start!
Of course I heard, but now that the three sect leaders are dead, I don't know what to do about this peak debate.
Why not, let's go and see the excitement?
Forget it, without an invite, no one can go, let alone this Peak of Challenge towering into the clouds, our Qinggong can't even get up...
Alas, you're right, let's just pay attention to the news, and see who will win this Peak of Jianghu!
(It seems that the peak debate will still open? Better pay more attention to the news around me.)
Now that I am the Peak of Jianghu, everyone in the world knows that my iron face is justice.
From now on, I will protect the justice of the world, and I will judge the villains of the world!
{PlayerName}, you've been doing well recently, but keep up the effort.
(Wait, why did I come here with the old lady...)
(Could it be that I actually like the old lady...)
Impossible, this can't be...
Kid, why did you bring me here?
I... I don't know...
I feel like I'm not in control of myself, and I inexplicably ended up here...
Kid, do you know what this place is for?
I know...
Listen to my advice, you will find a young and beautiful girl to come here with you.
I'm old, I'm not suitable for you, not suitable...
Old lady, let me explain--!
Leader, what do you mean by this...
Sect leader, are you testing me?
No, I didn't mean that...
Or do you have some special fetish?
Sigh, if the sect leader has such intentions... I'm not opposed...
Wait, don't come over, if you come any closer I'll scream!
Sect leader, what's wrong? Why are you suddenly shouting?
Huh? Just now I...
You said you were feeling a bit tired and took a nap, did you have a nightmare?
So, it was a dream...\nIt's good that it was a dream, it's good...
